introSection: Log Roll'r Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Yellowstone Bear World in Rexburg, Idaho, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride had an oval track layout. and the black bear-shaped train passes through a log-shaped tunnel.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 4 cars. In each car, riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows, for a total of 16 riders per train.

fullText:
Log Roll'r Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Yellowstone Bear World in Rexburg, Idaho, USA.

The ride had an oval track layout. and the black bear-shaped train passes through a log-shaped tunnel.

Blue track and blue supports.

Single train with 4 cars. In each car, riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows, for a total of 16 riders per train.
